category_sources: source_facts.description says it gets, unpacks, builds, and installs modules from CPAN; MetaCPAN docs describe cpanminus as a CPAN module installer.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cpanminus; MetaCPAN documentation uses App::cpanminus and cpanminus.
docs_sources: MetaCPAN pod is the official Perl module documentation; official GitHub README is the source repository documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage points to the GitHub project; MetaCPAN community section lists github.com/miyagawa/cpanminus as the source code repository and issue tracker.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies CPAN module installation; source_facts.executables lists cpanm; MetaCPAN docs describe dependency-free cpanm usage.
